message:
style(tls): rustfmt formatting for acceptor and connector handshake code

Applies rustfmt-standard formatting to the TLS acceptor and connector
modules. In both acceptor.rs and connector.rs, the crate::time::timeout
call chain is reformatted with each argument on its own line and the
trailing .await on a separate line, matching the project's preferred
Rust formatting style. In connector.rs the connect() function signature
is collapsed to a single line since it fits within the line width limit.
In acceptor.rs a test assertion chain is similarly collapsed. No
behavioral changes — purely mechanical formatting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
